<style>@keyframes hypno-spin {0%{transform: rotate(0deg);} 100%{transform: rotate(360deg);}} @keyframes hypno-pulse {0%,100%{transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1);} 50%{transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 40px #9D4EDD, inset 0 0 20px #000;}}.touch-scope .content {background: rgba(20, 0, 40, 0.85) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border: 1px solid #7B2CBF; position: relative; overflow: visible !important; margin-top: 110px !important; padding-top: 20px !important;}.touch-scope .content::before {content: ''; position: absolute; top: -120px; left: 50%; width: 200px; height: 200px; border-radius: 50%; margin-left: -100px; background: conic-gradient(from 0deg at 50% 50%, transparent 0deg, rgba(123, 44, 191, 0.15) 40deg, transparent 80deg, rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.15) 120deg, transparent 360deg); animation: hypno-spin 10s linear infinite; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; mix-blend-mode: screen;}.touch-scope .content::after {content: ''; position: absolute; top: -100px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 90px; height: 90px; border-radius: 50%; background: repeating-radial-gradient(circle, #240046 0, #240046 4px, #9D4EDD 5px, #9D4EDD 8px, #000 9px, #000 12px); border: 3px solid #E0AAFF; box-shadow: 0 0 20px #7B2CBF; animation: hypno-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; z-index: 1; pointer-events: none;}</style>

<div class="gs-root" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><style>.gs-root{--p1:#1a0a2e;--p2:#2d1054;--p3:#4a1a8a;--p4:#7b2fd4;--p5:#a855f7;--p6:#c084fc;--p7:#e9d5ff;--acc:#f0abfc;--gold:#d4af37;--dark:#0d0618;width:100%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0d0618 0%,#130924 50%,#0d0618 100%);border-left:1px solid rgba(122,47,212,.3);border-right:1px solid rgba(122,47,212,.3);position:relative;overflow-x:hidden;color:var(--p7);font-family:'Crimson Pro',Georgia,serif;padding:0 0 40px}.gs-root *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}.gs-bg-runes{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:.04;background-image:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 0 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}.gs-gallery-btn{width:48px;height:160px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(19,9,36,.9),rgba(45,16,84,.4));border:none;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--p6);font-size:22px;transition:all .3s;flex-shrink:0}.gs-gallery-btn:hover{color:var(--acc);background:rgba(74,26,138,.5)}.gs-gallery-btn.left{border-right:1px solid rgba(168,85,247,.3)}.gs-gallery-btn.right{border-left:1px solid rgba(168,85,247,.3)}.gs-gallery-viewport{width:360px;height:240px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(168,85,247,.35);box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(123,47,212,.25),inset 0 0 20px rgba(13,6,24,.5);background:#0d0618}.gs-gallery-track{display:flex;height:100%;transition:transform .5s cubic-bezier(.77,0,.175,1)}.gs-gallery-slide{min-width:360px;height:100%;cursor:zoom-in}.gs-gallery-slide img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block;background:#0d0618}.gs-gallery-dots{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 0 0 8px var(--p5)}.gs-lightbox{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(13,6,24,.95);z-index:999;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:zoom-out}.gs-lightbox.open{display:flex}.gs-lightbox img{max-width:90vw;max-height:90vh;object-fit:contain;border:1px solid rgba(168,85,247,.4)}.gs-divider{height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(168,85,247,.5),rgba(212,175,55,.3),rgba(168,85,247,.5),transparent);margin:0 20px}.gs-stats-section{padding:20px 20px 0}.gs-section-title{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',Georgia,serif;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.25em;color:var(--p4);text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px}.gs-section-title::before,.gs-section-title::after{content:'◆';color:var(--gold);margin:0 10px;font-size:7px}.gs-stat-row{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;padding:9px 14px;background:rgba(45,16,84,.2);border:1px solid rgba(74,26,138,.3);border-left:2px solid Decorative',Georgia,serif}@keyframes shimmer{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-10px)}50%{opacity:1}100%{opacity:0;transform:translateX(10px)}}.gs-ornament{text-align:center;color:rgba(212,175,55,.4);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.5em;padding:12px 0}.gs-opts{padding:10px 20px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:center;border-top:1px solid rgba(168,85,247,.3)}.gs-btn{background:rgba(45,16,84,.4);color:var(--p7);border:1px solid rgba(168,85,247,.5);font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',Georgia,serif;font-size:12px;padding:8px 16px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase}.gs-btn:hover{background:rgba(74,26,138,.5);border-color:var(--acc);color:var(--acc);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(168,85,247,.4)}</style><!-- Z_CONTENT
